mapper.sql: r.id, r.entry_id, r.reviewer_id, r.action, r.opinion, r.entry_version, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.is_deleted
u.real_name AS reviewer_name, e.title AS entry_title
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yx_knowledge_review r WHERE r.is_deleted = FALSE
AND r.entry_id = #{entryId}

SELECT ,
FROM yx_knowledge_review r LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_knowledge_entry e ON r.entry_id = e.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT ,
FROM yx_knowledge_review r LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_knowledge_entry e ON r.entry_id = e.id WHERE r.entry_id = #{entryId} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yx_knowledge_review (entry_id, reviewer_id, action, opinion, entry_version) VALUES (#{entryId}, #{reviewerId}, #{action}, #{opinion}, #{entryVersion})
